textByHash.05f1f130d567d3e0a388909b2e4599ee2bb85947: That correct. You find boat and go to Weiss by sea instead. Wolfbone tell you the way...
textByHash.196227b3cb0622074daa668dd29821237f2469b6: Our chief, Mother, want to trade. Weiss trolls invented stuff maybe these trolls want. An' maybe these trolls invented stuff we want in Weiss.
textByHash.27bc11e06552d7ee3b6894d3ce1e6870df41afc3: I plan to stay here, in the Stronghold, with my friend Burntmeat, but it good to hear of my home. Thank you.
textByHash.5ecad1902d928d1c37b2194945d8937fa5c9000a: Yes, I have learnt a lot here from my friend Burntmeat, and he has let me prepare a reward for you myself.
textByHash.6d49e6b5f88950b461892b3887f14a28147727ff: I come from troll town called Weiss, up in cold mountains to the north. We heard of trolls here, an' wanted to meet.
textByHash.88d5b961c3f0cbc2eaf3dab1f27038150e80998e: Give it to Burntmeat. He can teach trolls what they want to know from it.
textByHash.b80369a52147082b4991c08abf1722bff4214e62: It good to meet you. Burntmeat tells me you very helpful human.
textByHash.c2509102c7ff61a71504d8e688fca95b4add299d: Odd Mushroom invented lots of clever stuff with Snowflake. Might be handy for Stronghold trolls.
textByHash.c853b122ca00d6f312e011eecd51d4b1c3e033e4: So Mother want these trolls to send ambassador up to Weiss, maybe teach us their inventions, an' in return I teach Weiss inventions here.
textByHash.dd99c1e651cc83a755e309089a7053307b2d4b77: So My Arm taught Weiss the farming knowledge of the Stronghold trolls. Now Stronghold trolls can be given firemaking knowledge from Weiss, like I promised.
